title: Test Strategy, Contracts, Properties, and Mutation · Mastery Check
summary: Design a layered test suite around risks rather than file counts. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a risk-to-test coverage matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Assign unit, integration, contract, browser, system, and acceptance tests to distinct risks.
Test public behavior, invariants, boundaries, and failure recovery.
Use generated cases for algebraic properties, parser boundaries, and state invariants.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.

steps.title: Diagnose the hidden failure
steps.instruction:
quiz case — Use a changed quiz case for gates tests that tests this competency: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

The visible result looks correct, but its invariant or value contract is unverified. What must happen next?
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.

stimulus.title: Flaky Tests failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: Retrying a flaky test converts it into a reliable gate.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.

options.text: For diagnose the hidden failure, apply Flaky Tests without its stated preconditions, omit the a risk-to-test coverage matrix trace and counterexample, and treat one plausible output as complete proof. This does not satisfy Flaky Tests for a risk-to-test coverage matrix.
Run the Flaky Tests boundary case for a risk-to-test coverage matrix, inspect the actual mechanism, then accept or repair the claim.
Accept the Flaky Tests result because visible a risk-to-test coverage matrix output is the highest authority. This does not resolve diagnose the hidden failure.

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision
steps.instruction: Write the quiz evidence note for Flaky Tests: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Use a changed quiz case for gates tests that tests this competency: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
steps.why: Retrieving Flaky Tests through the concrete a risk-to-test coverage matrix case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.
